subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Hearken unto the call of Him Who guideth thee unto God, the Most High, the Most Great, through Whom the Sun hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مهدی ان استمع ندآء من یهدیک الی الله العلی العظیم الذی به اشرقت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
